Example

Enum TreatmentSessionStatus

Namespace
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.Types
Assembly
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.Types.dll

Status of the treatment session.

public enum TreatmentSessionStatus

Fields

Completed = 3

The plan in this session has been completely treated.

CompletedPartially = 4

The plan in this session has been partially treated.

InActiveResume = 6

There is no clinical decision yet on whether the plan should be treated or not. The Resume status was active before the status was set to InActiveResume.

InActiveTreat = 5

There is no clinical decision yet on whether the plan should be treated or not. The Treat status was active before the status was set to InActiveTreat.

Null = 0

If the value is null, the status of the treatment session is unknown.

Resume = 2

The plan in this session shall complete a partial treatment of the last incomplete fraction. When treating a plan based on this status, the fraction number remains the one of the last treatment. Any previously applied dose for the current fraction is taken into account and the user can complete the treatment.

Treat = 1

The plan in this session is to be treated as a complete fraction. When treating a plan based on this status, the fraction number shall be incremented by 1. In case of a previous partial treatment, the next session shall treat the plan completely. Typically, further treatments have to be treated completely as well.

Made with docfx
